headline: DTE Energy (DTE) Poised for 8% Growth on Data Center Opportunities
summary: DTE Energy Company (NYSE:DTE) is one of the top utility stocks to buy now. On April 9, analysts at Jefferies reiterated their Buy rating on DTE Energy Company (NYSE:DTE) and raised the price target to $170 from $153. The price target hike comes on the heels of the company inking a new data center deal […]
